title: Affirm and Wayfair expand partnership to the UK and Canada
text:
Affirm and Wayfair expand partnership to the UK and Canada

Affirm announced an expansion of its partnership with Wayfair, bringing its buy-now-pay-later offerings to shoppers in the UK and Canada as of February 2026.

Key Details:
- Partnership expansion marks Affirm's increased focus on international markets
- Wayfair partnership demonstrates merchant confidence in Affirm's platform
- Expansion into new geographies leverages existing partnerships
- Demonstrates diversification of merchant relationships beyond e-commerce
- Supports revenue growth from international markets

The Wayfair partnership expansion is part of Affirm's broader international strategy to establish presence in key markets including Canada and the UK. The furniture and home goods vertical represents an important category for BNPL adoption, demonstrating Affirm's ability to scale across merchant verticals.
